query: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(TABLE_NAME SEPARATOR ', ') as tables FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND (TABLE_NAME LIKE '%after_sales%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%sav%');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KKo9odT1HVTXECY.26f2cde391d3 --database jX4Ppf2KXZ8z9Tppipem7T --execute SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(TABLE_NAME SEPARATOR ', ') as tables FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND (TABLE_NAME LIKE '%after_sales%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%sav%');
